title: Kannuku Maiazhagu Lyrics Pudhiya Mugam Song Lyrics
stanzas:
Kannuku Maiazhagu
kavidhaiku poi azhagu
avaraikku poovazhagu
avarukku naan azhagu

malai nindra pinnaalum
ilai sindhum thuli azhagu
alai meendu ponaalum
karai konda nurai azhagu

Kannuku Maiazhagu
kavidhaiku poi azhagu
avaraikku poovazhagu
avarukku naan azhagu

aanandha manjaththal
avilndhaalum kulal ahagu
adaiyaalum muththathil
alindhaalum pottazhagu

pennodu kadhal vandhaal
piraikooda perazhagu
ennodu nee irundhaal
irul kooda orazhagu.

Kannuku Maiazhagu
kavidhaiku poi azhagu
avaraikku poovazhagu
avarukku naan azhagu

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the theme of Kannuku Maiazhagu?

The song beautifully captures the theme of love and admiration, highlighting the beauty in simplicity.

Who composed the music for Pudhiya Mugam?

The music for Pudhiya Mugam was composed by the legendary A.R. Rahman.

Who is the lyricist of the song?

The lyrics of Kannuku Maiazhagu were penned by the renowned lyricist Vairamuthu.

What emotions does the song evoke?

The song evokes feelings of romance, admiration, and a sense of soothing calmness.

When was Pudhiya Mugam released?

The movie Pudhiya Mugam was released in the year 1993.
enrichedMetadata.summary: The song Kannuku Maiazhagu from the movie Pudhiya Mugam is a melodious tribute to the beauty of love and admiration. Sung by P. Susheela, the song's soothing melody and poetic lyrics by Vairamuthu create an enchanting atmosphere. A.R. Rahman's composition enhances the romantic and melancholic mood, making it a timeless classic. The song beautifully conveys the emotions of love and the appreciation of beauty in everyday life.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Experience the enchanting beauty of Kannuku Maiazhagu from the movie Pudhiya Mugam. This mesmerizing melody, crafted by A.R. Rahman and penned by Vairamuthu, captures the essence of love and admiration. Let P. Susheela's soothing voice transport you to a world of poetic romance.
stanzaMeanings: For the eyes, black is beautiful; for poetry, lies are beautiful; for him, flowers are beautiful; for him, I am beautiful.
Even after the rain stops, the drops on the leaves are beautiful; even when the waves return, the foam on the shore is beautiful.
The stars that blink are beautiful with the night.
For the young man's eyes, I am always beautiful.
For the eyes, black is beautiful; for poetry, lies are beautiful; for him, flowers are beautiful; for him, I am beautiful.
Even if the turmeric fades, the flute is beautiful; even if the mark fades, the dot is beautiful.
When love comes to a girl, even the crescent moon is more beautiful; when you are with me, even darkness is bright.
For the eyes, black is beautiful; for poetry, lies are beautiful; for him, flowers are beautiful; for him, I am beautiful.
